design_concept.vibe: Modern DAW (Ableton/FL Studio/Bitwig) meets Cyberpunk Lyricist Notebook.
core_principles: No pure black backgrounds (#0A0A0A instead) to avoid OLED smear, but maintain extreme high contrast against neon.
Technical Precision: Use monospace fonts for data (BPM, keys, tags) and high-density layouts.
Neon Tension: Green is the sole vibrant color, used strictly for active states, playheads, and primary CTAs.
Terminal/Grid aesthetics: Exposed borders, 1px lines, split-pane modular layouts. Ditch traditional rounded cards.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase text-[#EDEDED]

layout.spacing: Dense 'Control Room' Grid (gap-4 or gap-6) for the workspace. Generous padding in editor panels (p-6).
layout.panels: Resizable split-panes mimicking DAWs. Example: Left (70%) for Waveform + Lyrics Editor, Right (30%) for AI Controls + Analysis.
layout.borders: Expose the grid. Use `border-collapse`, `border-r border-b border-[#222222]`.

buttons.primary: bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#00FF41] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all rounded-none px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#39FF14] text-[#39FF14] hover:bg-[#39FF14]/10 transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-3

inputs.default: bg-[#121212] border border-[#222222] text-[#EDEDED] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14] focus:border-[#39FF14] rounded-sm placeholder:text-[#666666]

specific_features.waveform: Implement via Wavesurfer.js. waveColor: '#222222', progressColor: '#39FF14', cursorColor: '#FFFFFF', cursorWidth: 2.
specific_features.lyric_editor: Textarea with font-body. Inline section tags (e.g., [VERSE 1], [CHORUS]) should be visually distinct (highlighted in JetBrains Mono with green text).
specific_features.audio_analysis_tags: Small badges `border border-[#222222] bg-[#121212] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono text-[#A0A0A0]`

images.description: Dynamic neon green lines on dark background. Use with absolute positioning, object-cover, and opacity-20.
Green abstract object on black. Good for placeholder track artwork in the songbook library.
Black condenser mic on black background. Great for an 'empty state' background or dropzone.

rules: Hover states: Sharp contrast changes, no soft fading.
Data updates: Flash text #EDEDED then fade to #39FF14 on value change.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor icons with `weight="duotone"` or `weight="bold"` depending on scale. Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.

rules: Ensure neon green (#39FF14) against dark background (#0A0A0A) passes APCA.
All interactive elements and testable states MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
Focus states MUST use high contrast `focus:ring-[#39FF14]`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react wavesurfer.js` before starting development.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto'. Override fonts in Tailwind: sans -> IBM Plex Sans, mono -> JetBrains Mono, display -> Unbounded.
UI must feel like a DAW (Control Room Grid). Prioritize strict geometric alignments and split-panes.
For the waveform, integrate wavesurfer.js for visual rendering of uploaded MP3s.
Components: Use Shadcn UI for forms, selects, and dialogs, but strip rounding (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`) and apply the dark/neon theme variables.
Never use fully transparent backgrounds behind text. Use `bg-[#121212]` or `bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl`.
Do NOT skip adding `data-testid` to buttons, inputs, tabs, and functional wrappers.
